tree.setup: You and your friend Xiao Lin are sitting on a bench by the lake in the park. Autumn leaves are falling around you. Xiao Lin looks up at the trees and starts talking about seasons.
tree.setup_zh: 你和朋友小林坐在公园湖边的长椅上。秋天的树叶正在飘落。小林抬头看着树，开始聊季节。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你看这些叶子，红的、黄的、橘的，真好看。我最喜欢秋天了。你呢？你最喜欢什么季节？
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ kàn zhèxiē yèzi, hóng de, huáng de, jú de, zhēn hǎokàn. Wǒ zuì xǐhuan qiūtiān le. Nǐ ne? Nǐ zuì xǐhuan shénme jìjié?
turns.text_en: Look at these leaves — red, yellow, orange — so pretty. I love autumn the most. What about you? What's your favorite season?

options.text_zh: 我最喜欢春天。到处都是花，空气新鲜，每次春天来了都特别开心。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ zuì xǐhuan chūntiān. Dàochù dōu shì huā, kōngqì xīnxiān, měi cì chūntiān lái le dōu tèbié kāixīn.
options.text_en: I like spring the most. Flowers everywhere, the air is fresh — every time spring comes I'm really happy.
options.feedback: Expressive and personal — paints a vivid picture of why you love spring.
Agreement but doesn't add your own perspective.

options.text_zh: 我没有特别喜欢的季节。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ méiyǒu tèbié xǐhuan de jìjié.
options.text_en: I don't have a particular favorite season.
options.feedback: Misses a chance to share and connect.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 春天也很美！但是我觉得秋天有一种特别的感觉——不热也不冷，而且看着叶子变颜色，感觉时间过得很慢。你觉得每个季节都有什么特别的地方吗？
turns.text_pinyin: Chūntiān yě hěn měi! Dànshì wǒ juéde qiūtiān yǒu yī zhǒng tèbié de gǎnjué — bú rè yě bù lěng, érqiě kàn zhe yèzi biàn yánsè, gǎnjué shíjiān guò de hěn màn. Nǐ juéde měi ge jìjié dōu yǒu shénme tèbié de dìfang ma?
turns.text_en: Spring is beautiful too! But I feel autumn has a special quality — not hot, not cold, and watching the leaves change color makes time feel slow. Do you think every season has something special?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Share something special about each season.

options.text_zh: 对啊。春天看花，夏天吃西瓜，秋天看树叶，冬天喝热茶。每个季节都挺好的。
options.text_pinyin: Duì a. Chūntiān kàn huā, xiàtiān chī xīguā, qiūtiān kàn shùyè, dōngtiān hē rè chá. Měi ge jìjié dōu tǐng hǎo de.
options.text_en: Yeah. Spring you watch flowers, summer eat watermelon, autumn enjoy the leaves, winter drink hot tea. Every season's got something.
options.feedback: And balanced — finds joy in every season.

options.text_zh: 大概吧，我没想过这个问题。
options.text_pinyin: Dàgài ba, wǒ méi xiǎng guò zhège wèntí.
options.text_en: Probably, I've never thought about it.
options.feedback: Honest but doesn't engage with the reflection.

options.text_zh: 夏天太热了，冬天太冷了，我觉得只有春天和秋天好。
options.text_pinyin: Xiàtiān tài rè le, dōngtiān tài lěng le, wǒ juéde zhǐyǒu chūntiān hé qiūtiān hǎo.
options.text_en: Summer is too hot, winter is too cold — I think only spring and autumn are good.
options.feedback: Opinionated but a bit negative about half the year.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你说得真好！我以前不喜欢冬天，但是后来发现冬天在家里看书喝茶确实很舒服。谢谢你，今天这个下午真开心。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ shuō de zhēn hǎo! Wǒ yǐqián bù xǐhuan dōngtiān, dànshì hòulái fāxiàn dōngtiān zài jiālǐ kàn shū hē chá quèshí hěn shūfu. Xièxie nǐ, jīntiān zhège xiàwǔ zhēn kāixīn.
turns.text_en: That's so well put! I used to not like winter, but later I found that reading and drinking tea at home in winter is actually really comfortable. Thank you — this afternoon has been so nice.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond warmly to close the conversation.

options.text_zh: 我也很开心。下次春天，我们再来这里看花吧。
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ yě hěn kāixīn. Xià cì chūntiān, wǒmen zài lái zhèlǐ kàn huā ba.
options.text_en: I'm happy too. Next spring, let's come back here to see the flowers.
options.feedback: Warm and forward-looking — makes a gentle plan for the future.
Agreeable but doesn't extend the warmth.

options.text_pinyin: Hǎo le, gāi huí jiā le.
options.feedback: Abrupt end to a gentle moment.

tree.cultural_note: Appreciating the changing seasons is deeply embedded in Chinese culture. Each season has its associated activities, foods, and feelings. The practice of sitting with a friend and simply watching nature — without needing to do anything — reflects the Chinese value of being present in the moment.
